Interface CursorBrowserResultItem

All Superinterfaces:
BrowserItem, BrowserResultsItem, Cursor, CursorBrowserItem, HardwareBindable, ObjectProxy, RelativeHardwarControlBindable, Subscribable
public interface CursorBrowserResultItem extends BrowserResultsItem, CursorBrowserItem
Instances of this interface represent entries in a browser column.
Since:
API version 1
